channel.title: The Morning Bloom
channel.description: Daily news briefing — AI & Technology, IT Industry, Recruitment & HR. Pune Edition.

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Friday, July 24, 2026
item.description: White House Accuses Moonshot AI of Distilling Anthropic's Fable for Kimi K3 · OpenAI Launches Presence: Enterprise Platform for AI Agents · Hugging Face Hit by Autonomous AI-Driven Security Breach · Accenture Confirms 35GB Data Theft; Source Code, Keys Exposed · Tech Job Market Stays Hot: 280K+ Openings, Diverse Hiring Events · AI Skills Premium Widening as Hiring Managers Demand Specialized Talent

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Thursday, July 23, 2026
item.description: Google Releases Gemini 3.6 Flash with 17% Fewer Tokens · Microsoft and Mistral Expand Partnership with Multibillion-Dollar GPU Deal · AWS CloudFront Outage Takes Down Canvas, Blackboard, Hugging Face · Ransomware Groups Target Higher Ed and Government in July Wave · Tech Layoffs Surge—205,832 Cut Across 322 Events in 2026 · AI Skills Now Essential in 75% of Tech Job Postings

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Wednesday, July 22, 2026
item.description: Anduril & Archer unveil 'Thunder,' an autonomous attack aircraft · Washington weighs an independent referee for frontier AI · A stolen login wipes Romania's entire land registry · Cloud outages become 2026's 'new normal' · Tech layoffs pass 205,000 as AI rewrites the org chart · AI skills now sit in 75% of tech job postings

item.title: The Morning Bloom — Tuesday, July 21, 2026
item.description: AI's Wall Street moment: OpenAI & Anthropic eye IPOs · AMD's Helios lands Microsoft in strike at Nvidia · Silicon supply side: Alphabet's leaner chip, TSMC's $265B Arizona bet · Europe's AI Act bares its teeth as GPAI rules take hold · Enterprise AI's reality check: everyone deploys, few cash in · The open-weight frontier closes the gap — in Chinese · IT budgets hit $6.31T as the data-center boom eats the forecast · In 2026, attackers don't break in — they log in · Tech hiring's great divergence: AI roles soar, market shrinks · The machines are reading your résumé — and interviewing you · India's fresher windows open — against a skills gap
